name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (3.0L V6 biturbo petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M276 3.0L biturbo: 15,000 km / 12 months EU fixed/ASSYST class; spirited use 10,000 km rec.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 proxy; no E 400 table on auto-abc).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Updated to 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 spark row).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: consider ~120,000 km if rough idle or boost issues.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for M276 biturbo Oil Service class)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 maintenance plan; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 50,000 km to 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 spark row)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 M276 service manual maintenance table (engine coolant); time cap applied per platform coolant rule
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Changed REC to 120,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (serpentine belt)
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo V6 — intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
